_about: Single source of truth for every label + description rendered into the protocol log. Templates use {placeholder} for dynamic values substituted at runtime. All references to the agent server are spelled 'Agent Server' (not 'AS') to avoid conflation with 'Access Server' elsewhere in the AAuth protocol. Person Server is 'PS' in terse HTTP lines and 'Person Server' in prose.

generate_ephemeral.label: Agent: generate ephemeral key
generate_ephemeral.description: Agent generates an Ed25519 keypair — private stays local, public binds the issued token to this agent so only the private-key holder can use it.

ps_discovery_request.description: Discovers the PS's bootstrap_endpoint and interaction_endpoint — needed before the agent can call anything else on the PS.

ps_bootstrap_request.description: Agent starts the ceremony at the PS; 202 returns a pending URL to poll plus a consent URL to show the user.

ps_pending_longpoll.description: Agent waits for consent; Prefer: wait=30 holds the connection open so the PS can push state immediately instead of tight polling.

ps_consent_prompt.label: User at PS: consent prompt
ps_consent_prompt.description: User approves (or denies) at the PS via redirect or QR — their decision resolves the long-poll above.

ps_bootstrap_token_received.label: PS response: bootstrap_token received
ps_bootstrap_token_received.description: Signed JWT cnf-bound to the agent's ephemeral; single-use ticket the agent hands to its own Agent Server next.

agent_server_challenge_request.description: Agent Server verifies the PS signature on bootstrap_token and issues a WebAuthn challenge — gates who can mint agent_token.

webauthn_ceremony_success.label: User at Browser: WebAuthn ceremony
webauthn_ceremony_success.description: User taps the passkey / platform authenticator to sign the Agent Server's challenge — proves a human is present and the correct credential is on this device.

agent_server_verify_request.description: Agent Server verifies the WebAuthn response, records the (PS, user) binding so future refreshes skip the PS round-trip.

ps_consent_prompt.label: User at PS: consent prompt (resumed)
ps_consent_prompt.description: Page was reloaded (or returned from the PS redirect) mid-ceremony — resuming the long-poll against the saved pending URL.

cannot_refresh.label: Cannot refresh
cannot_refresh.description: No ephemeral key + agent_token pair present locally. Full bootstrap required.

stage_new_ephemeral.label: Agent: stage new ephemeral key
stage_new_ephemeral.description: Agent generates a fresh keypair but holds it staged; /refresh is still signed with the old key (matches current agent_token.cnf). The new key is committed only after verify succeeds so a failed refresh leaves the old agent_token usable.

agent_server_refresh_challenge_request.description: Agent asks its own Agent Server for a WebAuthn challenge against the stored binding; signed with the old ephemeral so the Agent Server can prove the caller is the current cnf-holder.

webauthn_ceremony_success.label: User at Browser: WebAuthn ceremony
webauthn_ceremony_success.description: User taps the passkey to sign the Agent Server's refresh challenge — proves the same human is still present on this device.

agent_server_refresh_verify_request.description: Agent returns the signed WebAuthn assertion; Agent Server verifies it, promotes the staged key to cnf-bound for the new agent_token, and mints fresh tokens.

agent_server_authorize_request.description: Agent asks its own Agent Server for a resource_token scoped to this PS + resource; signed with the agent's ephemeral and carrying the agent_token as authentication.

ps_token_request.description: Agent trades the resource_token with the PS for a scoped auth_token. 200 = scopes already consented; 202 = user consent needed for a scope upgrade.

ps_pending_longpoll.description: Agent long-polls the PS pending URL for the auth_token. Prefer: wait=30 asks the PS to hold the request for up to 30s; on 202 the client loops immediately.

ps_consent_prompt.label: User at PS: consent prompt
ps_consent_prompt.description: User approves the scope upgrade at the PS (redirect or QR) — the long-poll above resolves once they decide.

ps_consent_prompt.label: User at PS: consent prompt (resumed)
ps_consent_prompt.description: Resuming the authorize long-poll after a return from the PS — waits for the user's scope-consent decision to resolve.

request.description: Calling the resource's demo endpoint. The request is signed per RFC 9421 with sig=jwt;jwt="<auth_token>": the server verifies the HTTP signature against auth_token.cnf.jwk (our ephemeral), then separately verifies the auth_token itself against the PS JWKS and checks that scope covers the required resource scope.

approve_at_ps.continue_label: Continue at your Person Server to approve this agent
